arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS: How Bolton Wanderers' players fared in 5-1 Arsenal defeat
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers went out of the Carabao Cup with a 5-1 defeat at Premier League Arsenal. But how did we score the players?

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides David Raya injury update ahead of Arsenal vs Leicester
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has provided an update on David Raya after the Arsenal goalkeeper missed the Carabao Cup third round win against Bolton Wanderers. Raya missed the clash due to a thigh injury, football.london understands, with 16-year-old Jack Porter making his debut against the League One side.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta insists Ethan Nwaneri will get more chances for Arsenal this season
arts.sum: The highly-rated midfielder delivered on his first start for the Gunners after he struck in both halves.

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup fourth-round draw in full as Man Utd, Liverpool and Arsenal discover fate
arts.sum: The draw for the fourth round of the Carabao Cup has been completed, with Manchester United, Manchester City and Chelsea among the clubs to learn their fate for the October fixtures

arts.ttl: Arsenal player ratings vs Bolton: Ethan Nwaneri enjoys dream night as Raheem Sterling display bodes well
arts.sum: Youthful Arsenal side delivered as rotated cast took chance

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri and Jack Porter take the limelight in Arsenal’s win over Bolton
arts.sum: Nwaneri netted twice while Declan Rice, Raheem Sterling and Kai Havertz were also on target.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard issues injury update ahead of Arsenal's title surge after the Gunners captain missed north London derby win and Man City draw
arts.sum: The midfielder limped off in the second half of his country's 2-1 win over Austria in the Nations League during the last internatioanl break in worrying signs for Gunners supporters.

arts.ttl: Arsenal team news: 16-year-old in goal as Raheem Sterling makes full debut
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta makes sweeping changes for Wednesday's EFL Cup third-round tie with Bolton Wanderers, where four teenagers will make their full debuts.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Bolton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: After an extremely challenging week, Arsenal return to action on Wednesday evening when they host Bolton Wanderers in the Carabao Cup third round. Arsenal predicted lineup vs Bolton (4-3-3) : Porter; White, Kacurri, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Jorginho, Nwaneri, Oulad M'Hand; Saka, Jesus, Sterling.

arts.ttl: Striker decision made: Bolton Wanderers team news and predicted XI to face Arsenal
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers are in Carabao Cup action this evening with an away trip to the Emirates Stadium to… The post Striker decision made: Bolton Wanderers team news and predicted XI to face Arsenal appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
